reason: The tweet is a common Islamic prayer asking for good in this life and the hereafter, and protection from the punishment of fire. It does not encourage or praise fighting or ask for support for fighters.
original_post: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ . #دعاء .
